qualification.interval_policy: 80 percent normal approximation from held-out error until validated quantile model exists
qualification.prop_score_formula: 0.55 probability + 1.20 capped absolute edge - uncertainty penalty; health, data quality, freshness, consensus, availability confidence, and lineup confidence are hard gates

metadata.note: Real projections are visible as candidates. Publication still requires verified player availability and all quality gates.

candidate_predictions.candidate_reason: Verified player availability is required before publication.
